channel.title: Legal Tech News Feed
channel.description: The RSS Feed powering the Suffolk LIT Lab's Law + Tech News Bot.

item.title: Amazon’s Smart Thermostat is on sale for just $58
item.description:
If your electricity bill climbs every summer, a smart thermostat could help keep cooling costs in check. The Amazon Smart Thermostat is an excellent option for its price, especially today. It’s down to just $57.99 at Amazon as a part of Amazon’s early Prime Day sale, which is the best price we’ve seen since Black […]

Source feed: https://www.theverge.com/rss/index.xml

item.title: Supreme Court Declines To Review Pauline Newman’s Suspension
item.description:
Rough. The post Supreme Court Declines To Review Pauline Newman’s Suspension appeared first on Above the Law.

Source feed: https://abovethelaw.com/feed/

item.title: Chipmaker Nvidia seeks to raise over $25B in first bond deal since 2021
item.description:
Debt sale set to test investor appetite for further exposure to AI sector amid a deluge of borrowing.

Source feed: http://feeds.arstechnica.com/arstechnica/index

item.title: All the news about Anthropic’s new AI fight with the White House
item.description:
Anthropic was already navigating one dispute with the government in its standoff with the Pentagon, and then came an order on June 12th to block off foreign access to its most recently released AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5. When they launched on June 9th, Anthropic said “Fable 5’s capabilities exceed those of any […]

Source feed: https://www.theverge.com/rss/index.xml

item.title: Meet the world’s top AI-pilled economists
item.description:
Most of them are not found in ivory towers

Source feed: https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/rss.xml

item.title: A Chinese rocket breaks apart dangerously close to the Starlink constellation
item.description:
The rocket's breakup likely generated 100 to 150 new pieces of space junk.

Source feed: http://feeds.arstechnica.com/arstechnica/index

item.title: Why do South Koreans love AI so much?
item.description:
This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. When I landed in Seoul after a grueling 12-hour flight from San Francisco, I walked through an unmanned immigration checkpoint, where a machine scanned my face and passport. On the subway home,…

Source feed: https://www.technologyreview.com/feed/

item.title: Fox’s $22B Roku acquisition aims to expand its reach into smart TVs, advertising
item.description:
Fox plans to take over Roku's streaming hardware, OS, and FAST services.

Source feed: http://feeds.arstechnica.com/arstechnica/index

item.title: Users cry foul after AMD stripped memory crypto from its consumer CPUs
item.description:
AMD's stripping of TSME from consumer CPUs appears to be a deliberate, covert move.

Source feed: http://feeds.arstechnica.com/arstechnica/index
